channel.title: X86_64 on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in X86_64 on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: Upgrading to Fedora 10
item.description: As some of you know I run Fedora on my main Laptop, and Ubuntu on my EEE and my office Desktop. My Ubuntu installs were pretty fresh, but my fedora was long due for an upgrade. As after years of abuse (–force –nodeps) it usually is impossible to do a regular upgrade, so my best way out was a quick and fresh install on an isolated root partition. (my /home/ etc live on separate volumes)
